_doc: Launch original sectional — Direction Sense. Generated from computed templates; no competitor question text copied.

questions.stem_en: A person walks 8 km North, then 6 km East, then 3 km South. What is the final displacement from the starting point?
questions.stem_hi: एक व्यक्ति 8 km North, then 6 km East, then 3 km South चलता है। Starting point से final displacement क्या है?

options.label: B
options.trap_reason_en: Reported total path length, not final displacement from the start.
options.trap_reason_hi: Total path length दे दिया, starting point से displacement नहीं।

options.label: C
options.trap_reason_en: Used only horizontal displacement and ignored vertical displacement.
options.trap_reason_hi: सिर्फ horizontal displacement लिया, vertical ignore किया।

options.label: D
options.trap_reason_en: Used only vertical displacement and ignored horizontal displacement.
options.trap_reason_hi: सिर्फ vertical displacement लिया, horizontal ignore किया।

questions.explanation_method_en: Net east-west displacement = 6; net north-south displacement = 5. Combine them to get 11 km by path, North-East. Therefore, answer = 11 km by path, North-East.
questions.explanation_concept_en: Direction problems are coordinate problems. Opposite directions cancel; perpendicular components combine to give final displacement and direction. Final answer is 11 km by path, North-East.
questions.explanation_method_hi: Net east-west displacement = 6; net north-south displacement = 5। इन्हें combine करने पर 11 km by path, North-East मिलता है। अतः answer = 11 km by path, North-East।
questions.explanation_concept_hi: Direction problems coordinate problems हैं। Opposite directions cancel होते हैं; perpendicular components final displacement देते हैं। Final answer 11 km by path, North-East है।

options.trap_reason_hi: सिर्फ vertical displacement लिया, horizontal ignore किया।
